title: Abu al-Abbas al-Nabati
body: Ahmad bin Muhammad bin Mufarraj bin Ani al-Khalil (fl. c. 1200), better known as Abu al-Abbas al-Nabati, Ibn al-Rumiya or al-Ashshab, (Arabic: أبو العباس النباتي, Abu’l-ʿAbbās al-Nabātī), was an Arab scientist, botanist, pharmacist and theologian from al-Andalus. He was a teacher of fellow Andalusian botanist Ibn al-Baitar.
categories: Alchemists of the medieval Islamic world
